rationale: Internal refactor converting libmongoc calls to operations layer for thread safety; no spec rule contradicted.
Re-sync transaction spec tests for new UnknownTransactionCommitResult label; child of DRIVERS-505.
Resync transactions spec tests per DRIVERS-500; test file update, not driver behavior fix.
API ergonomics: making WriteModel properties public for user convenience; no spec involvement.
Swift module namespace conflict with MongoSwift class name; language-specific API naming issue, no spec.
Internal refactor of Database/Collection initializer signatures; no spec behavior change.
Improvement implementing cursor support in listCollections/listIndexes per DRIVERS-197; driver not previously wrong.
Internal Swift memory-safety issue with bson_t pointer sharing and copy-on-write; no spec rule violated.
Sessions spec quoted: MongoDatabase/Collection methods SHOULD take session; drop methods missing session parameter.
API ergonomics: changing options properties from let to var for mutability; no spec rule involved.
API cleanup: ReadPreference getters return Optional unnecessarily; Swift type system issue, no spec.
Improvement using constant-time hash comparison per DRIVERS-255; security hardening, no specific spec rule cited.
Wire protocol spec says do not validate startingFrom in OP_REPLY; driver was validating it incorrectly.
Sessions spec changed: endSessions command no longer takes ids parameter; driver used wrong parameter name.
WriteConcern spec tests check negative w/wtimeoutMS are invalid; driver skips failing tests due to libmongoc gap.
Making BSONValue types conform to Swift Hashable protocol; language API improvement, no spec rule.
Adding WriteConcern option to drop methods; missing feature addition, not contradicting a specific spec rule.
Swift Codable decoder misses Timestamp/BSONUndefined/DBPointer types; Swift-specific decoding bug, not a BSON spec rule violation.
Internal refactor: stop wrapping mongoc ReadConcern/WriteConcern types, use native structs; no behavior change.
Improvement adding maxTimeMS to index commands per DRIVERS-374; new spec feature, driver not previously wrong.
Renaming commandOptions to options in index commands for internal API consistency; no spec rule.
CI/docs process improvement: automating documentation regeneration detection; no spec involvement.
Thread safety implementation for MongoClient/Database/Collection internal state; implementation quality, no spec rule.
Adding APM assertions to change stream spec tests; enhancing test coverage in spec test suite.
Modify change stream output examples per DRIVERS-537 spec change; test/doc update, not driver fix.
Move listCollections filter to top-level parameter to match listDatabases; internal API consistency refactor.
Make ServerVersion CustomStringConvertible for nicer test output; internal test utility improvement.
Check cursor error before calling next to avoid overwriting original error; internal implementation improvement.
Convert MongoDatabase/Collection from classes to structs; Swift compiler crash workaround, internal refactor.
Return connection to pool when cursor exhausted (not at deinit); performance/resource management improvement.
Refactor BulkWriteOperation to follow Operation pattern; internal architectural consistency improvement.
Internal encoding approach for IndexModel+IndexOptions; implementation quality issue, no spec rule.
Implementing index enumeration spec for first time; new feature addition, not a nonconformance.
Implementing collection enumeration spec for first time; new feature addition, not a nonconformance.
Refactor ChangeStream to use Operations pattern like MongoCursor; internal architectural consistency.
Add special executor logic for connection-holding operations; internal implementation improvement.
Spec defines wtimeoutMS as int64; driver truncates to int32 when passing to libmongoc, violating spec.
Update Decimal128 to pass const pointer after CDRIVER-3069 API change; libmongoc interop fix, no spec.
API ergonomics investigation for bulk write model type aliases; no spec rule, just Swift verbosity issue.
API design: URI vs options struct precedence; Go driver mentioned as inspiration but no behavioral divergence filed.
API design: nil vs unset vs default read/write concern semantics; internal API usability, no specific spec rule.
Standardize parameter ordering in options initializers; API consistency, no spec rule.
Add helper method for reading spec test files; test utility refactor to reduce copy-paste in test runner.
Array conditional BSONValue conformance using Swift 4.2 generics; Swift type system improvement, not a BSON spec rule.
Retryable writes spec tests failing against latest server due to error label parsing change; test compatibility fix.
Move internal test helper method to Tests module; code organization refactor, no spec involvement.
Change stream tests failing on sharded cluster due to SERVER-44112; CI investigation, no specific spec rule.
Redesign error types as structs for API extensibility; internal API design improvement, no spec rule.
Vendor libmongoc into Swift driver build; build/packaging change, no spec behavior.
Fix GitHub linguist language statistics for vendored C code; build/repository metadata, no spec.
